english_text: I have a bad feeling about this
I cannot sleep because of anxiety
I am afraid of the dark
I feel like something bad will happen
korean_text: 안 좋은 일이 일어날 것 같아
romanization: an joeun iri ireonal geot gata

english_text: I get anxious in crowded places
I freeze when I am scared
I am afraid of being alone
I am worried about the results
I am afraid of losing people
I am nervous about the interview
I am scared of the unknown
I am afraid I will mess up
I worry about what others think
I am afraid of making mistakes
I keep checking if everything is okay
I get anxious about the future
But I am trying to be brave
It is okay to be scared
I am learning to manage my fears
You are braver than you know
Courage is not the absence of fear
